zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de Hochstaden於1214年出生時，她的父親Lothar I. von Are-Hochstaden39歲，母親Mathilde von Vianden34歲。她於1240年與Adolf IV. von Berg結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1314年1月30日在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫奧培波吉設 可萊斯賀可斯瓦根享年100歲。

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de Hochstaden was born in 1214, her father, Lothar I. von Are-Hochstaden, was 39 and her mother, Mathilde von Vianden, was 34. She married Adolf IV. von Berg in 1240. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 30 January 1314, in Hückeswagen, Oberbergischer Kreis, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, at the age of 100.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de Hochstaden est née en 1214, son père, Lothar I. von Are-Hochstaden, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Mathilde von Vianden, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Adolf IV. von Berg en 1240. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 30 janvier 1314, à Hückeswagen, Oberbergischer Kreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 100 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de Hochstaden 1214 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lothar I. von Are-Hochstaden 39 und ihre Mutter Mathilde von Vianden 34. Sie hat 1240 Adolf IV. von Berg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 30. Januar 1314 im Alter von 100 Jahren in Hückeswagen, Oberbergischer Kreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland.

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Hochstaden(이)가 1214년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lothar I. von Are-Hochstaden(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde von Vianden(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1240년 Adolf IV. von Berg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1314년 1월 30일 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 오버버지슈어 크레이스 huc케스와겐에서 100세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de Hochstaden родилась в 1214 г., её отцу по имени Lothar I. von Are-Hochstaden было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde von Vianden, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adolf IV. von Berg в 1240 г. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 30 января 1314 г. в местности хuккесваджен, обирбиргищир крис, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия в возрасте 100 лет.
